Big Sky Atlas · Guided Wilderness

Expeditions.

Three trails into the American West. Each one chosen for what it asks of you — not the distance, but the attention.

Bighorn Sanctuary · Day 01

The approach.

Dawn in Buffalo, Wyoming. Coffee black as basalt. The trailhead is forty minutes on dirt road — you won't find it without a guide who's been there before.

Bighorn Sanctuary · Day 02

Mirror lake.

Twelve miles in, the sanctuary opens. Mornings are glass. Afternoons are wind. The camp sits on a granite shelf above water that holds the range upside-down.

Bighorn Sanctuary · Day 03

The walk out.

Down through the pines the way we came. Different light. Different legs. You won't forget the quiet — it's what the walk was for.

Day 01 / 03
Duration 3days
Distance 48mi
Effort Moderate
Season Jun—Sep
From $1,890/ p
Reserve Bighorn →
Beartooth Summits · Day 01

Above the treeline.

We cross Beartooth Pass at 10,900 feet. The last tree falls behind us by noon. Weather is the plan — we adjust, we don't push.

Beartooth Summits · Day 02

The plateau.

A full day on high ground. Wildflowers where the snow pulled back last month. Alpine lakes you can see the bottom of. The air thins. You learn to notice it.

Beartooth Summits · Day 03

Twin lakes descent.

Down through glacial cirques. Optional summit in the morning for those who want it. By evening, we're back to cell signal — the part of the trip you haven't missed.

Day 01 / 03
Duration 3days
Distance 52mi
Effort Challenging
Season Jul—Sep
From $2,340/ p
Reserve Beartooth →
Teton Traverse · Day 01

The saddle.

From Jenny Lake up to the first saddle at 9,400 feet. The Cathedral Group grows closer with every switchback. First night at String Lake.

Teton Traverse · Day 02

Granite alley.

The traverse day. Between the Middle and the Grand, you walk where only the weather and the light change. Lunch above Cascade Canyon.

Teton Traverse · Day 03

Paintbrush divide.

One more pass before the walk out. The Tetons go quiet behind you. Leigh Lake to close. Cold beer in Moose by dinner.

Day 01 / 03
Duration 3days
Distance 38mi
Effort Moderate
Season Jun—Sep
From $2,180/ p
Reserve Teton →
